zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Cooke於大約1506年出生在英國英格蘭素可盧斯廷頓時，她的父親John Cooke I27歲，母親Joane Howles17歲。她於1519年與John Covert III在英國英格蘭奧可福爾可姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1582年在英國英格蘭素可享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Cooke于大约1506年出生在英国英格兰素可盧斯廷頓时，她的父亲John Cooke I27岁，母亲Joane Howles17岁。她于1519年与John Covert III在英国英格兰奧可福爾可姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1582年在英国英格兰素可享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cook  .

History: Francis Cooke (died 1663) and his eldest son John were passengers on the Mayflower in 1621; they were joined two years later by Francis's wife and other children. In the words of William Bradford, he lived long enough ‘to see his children's children have children’.

variants.name: Cook
meanings: English: occupational name for a cook, a seller of cooked meats, or a keeper of an eating house, from Middle English cok, coke, cook, couk, cuk(e) (Old English cōc) ‘cook’ or ‘seller of cooked foods’. See also Kew .
Irish and Scottish: usually identical in origin with the English name (see 1 above), but in some cases a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cúg ‘son of Hugo’ (see McCook ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cook’, such as German and Jewish Koch , Dutch Kook , Polish Kucharz and Kucharczyk , Slovenian and Croatian Kuhar , North German Kuk .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Cooke was born about 1506, in Rustington, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Cooke I, was 27 and her mother, Joane Howles, was 17. She married John Covert III in 1519, in Combe, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died about 1582, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Cooke est née environ 1506, à Rustington, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Cooke I, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joane Howles, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé John Covert III en 1519, à Combe, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1582, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Cooke um 1506 in Rustington, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Cooke I 27 und ihre Mutter Joane Howles 17. Sie hat 1519 in Combe, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom John Covert III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 1582 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Cooke è nata il circa 1506 nel Rustington, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Cooke I, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Joane Howles, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato John Covert III nel 1519, nel Combe, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1582, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cookeが約1506年にイギリスイギリススセックスルスティントンで生まれた時，父John Cooke Iは27歳，母Joane Howlesは17歳であった。1519年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアコンベでJohn Covert IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1582年にイギリスイギリススセックスで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cooke(이)가 대략 1506년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 러스틴그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Cooke I(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane Howles(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 코브에서 John Covert III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1582년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Cooke nasceu aproximadamente 1506, em Rustington, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Cooke I, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joane Howles, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com John Covert III em 1519, em Combe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1582, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Cooke родилась около 1506 г. в местности рустингтон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Cooke I было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Howles, 17. Она умерла около 1582 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.
